Haa...what a pain... ...I wanna go home already... ...Rii...

Tch! You bastard, slacking off in a place like this again?! If you don't work, you're
skipping dinner today!
Whoa!? N-no, please...! I-I'm going right now! Wait for me~!!
That voice...I feel like I've heard it somewhere before... Could it be Dario...?
完了までウェイト = true
ボイス再生(フェードイン・BGM調整可)
Ahh... Master, stop... Ngh, hah... oh...♡
? I think I can hear a woman's voice... Must be my imagination...
Don't talk to me, I'm working. The butler will speak with you.

Hey, how long are you planning to stay here? Get back to that village, now. Before I
have to throw you out as a suspicious character.

Who the hell are you? One of those villagers? What business do you have here? Your
work here is already done.

...Ah, no, wait. You, your body, it's quite well-built, isn't it? A big difference
from that fatso who was here before.

In that case, there's a job I'd like to entrust to someone like you. It's heavy
labor, but the pay is guaranteed. If you want to hear the details, go talk to the
butler at the mansion's entrance.

Who the hell are you? From the village? What business do you have here? Your work
should already be done.

...Ah, no, wait. You, that body of yours, it's quite well-built, isn't it? A big
difference from that fatso who was here before.

In that case, there's a job I'd like to entrust to someone like you. It's quite heavy
labor, but I promise the pay matches it. If you want to hear the details, come back
here once more while the sun is still high.

Oh, a village laborer? In that case, I happen to have a job perfect for someone like
you. I'd like you to carry these packages to the mansion.

Then, I'll leave these to you. Please be careful not to damage them. They're all
items you could never hope to compensate for.

I carried the luxurious furniture I'd never seen before into the room... More than
the physical exhaustion, the strain of trying not to break anything was
painful........

parameters.message: エリィのご飯のお陰で頑張れた･･･！

parameters: メッセージ = エリィのご飯のお陰で頑張れた･･･！

Thank you very much. Here is your pay for today. Since you worked so diligently, I
added a little extra.
Thank you very much. Here is your pay for today.

...! I received an unbelievable amount of pay...! To get this without even working
half a day... As expected of a noble-sama.
// 進行度2　雨の日以外

White liquid is staining the green grass... This smell, i-is that... semen...? Who on
earth would do something like this here........
